case_title: MAURICIO SOUZA VS. CARLOS MENDOZA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,632.85 FILED BY SOUZA, MAURICIO AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, CARLOS LOPEZ, GUILLERMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUZA, MAURICIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-28-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED.
CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT GUILLERMO LOPEZ.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ GUILLERMO FILED BY SOUZA, MAURICIO MENDOZA, CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2011 BY JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT-CARLOS MENDOZA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT-LOPEZ GUILLERMO. DEFENDANT--CARLOS MENDOZA TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2011 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION JAN-20-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT--CARLOS MENDOZA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER, AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY GUILLERMO LOPEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MENDOZA, CARLOS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
RETURNED MAIL: GUILLERMO LOPEZ CONTINUE ORDER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT CARLOS MENDOZA WAS REPRESENTED BY EDWARD SILVA--SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GUILLERMO LOPEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUZA, MAURICIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, CARLOS LOPEZ, GUILLERMO $6,632.85 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,632.85, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GUILLERMO LOPEZ. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED SENT TO DEFENDANT GUILLERMO LOPEZ.
